kirundi.sage_spells_unlock_when_you_make_progr: Amarozi y’Umunyabwenge afungurwa iyo utera imbere mu bindi bikoresho vya STEM Lab — Umushakashatsi w’ikirere, Laboratwari y’Imibare, RoadReady n’ibindi. Buri rozi ni ubushobozi bwo kwimenyereza-kwibuka — uritangaza usubiza ikibazo giturutse mu rwego rw’ico gikoresho.
kirundi.scroll_down_to_yet_to_discover_and_cli: Manuka ugere kuri «Bitaravumburwa» hanyuma ufyonde buto
kirundi.button_that_ll_take_you_to_the_tool_th: ya rozi iyo ari yo yose. Izokujana ku gikoresho kiyifungura.
kirundi.allobot_is_watching_your_progress_ever: AlloBot areba iterambere ryawe hose. Ubutumwa, ikibazo canke imyitozo imwe mu kindi gikoresho bizatangira kwugurura amarozi hano.
kirundi.open_study_hall_untimed_practice_mode: Ugurura Icumba co Kwiga — uburyo bwo kwimenyereza butagira igihe
kirundi.untimed_drill_no_damage_full_explanati: Imyitozo itagira igihe · Nta kwangirika · Ibisobanuro vyuzuye
kirundi.ai_scaffolds_while_learner_does_most_o: AI itanga inkunga mu gihe umwigeme akora imirimo myinshi yo kwiyumvira. Kwiga nyakuri + umutekano ushize mu gaciro.
kirundi.real_learning_happens_with_ai_assist_t: Kwiga nyakuri kubaho hifashishijwe AI. Kuguranana bishizwe mu gaciro.
kirundi.high_error_cost_low_learner_effort_ai_: Ikiguzi c’ikosa kinini + imbaraga z’umwigeme nkeya + AI mu ruziga = ibisubizo bigaragara neza ariko bidakomeza mu bikorwa.
kirundi.ai_workload_inquiry_who_is_doing_the_t: 🔬 Iperereza ku Mutwaro w’Akazi wa AI — Ninde wiyumvira?
kirundi.set_ai_assistance_level_learner_effort: Shiraho urwego rw’inkunga ya AI, imbaraga z’umwigeme, ubushasha bw’umurimo n’ikiguzi c’ikosa. Gereranya imiterere yo kwiga. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_when_does_ai_assist_he: Iciyumviro cawe (Ni ryari inkunga ya AI ifasha aho kwangiza? Umurongo wawushira he?)
kirundi.e_g_on_high_novelty_tasks_ai_is_a_brai: urugero, ku mirimo mishasha AI ni umufatanyabikorwa wo kwiyumvira; ku murimo usanzwe ihagarika ubuhanga...
kirundi.ai_assist_learner_effort_sums_to_100_w: Inkunga ya AI + imbaraga z’umwigeme vyose > 100 — inkunga irenze ikora iki ku nyungu yo kwiga?
kirundi.why_does_novelty_matter_for_both_learn: Kuki ubushasha ari ingenzi ku kwiga n’ingaruka vyombi?
kirundi.when_is_ai_doing_90_of_the_work_actual: Ni ryari AI ikora 90% vy’umurimo ari icemezo ciza koko? (Inyibutso: ikiguzi c’ikosa gito, ubushasha buke, umusaruro ufite igitutu c’igihe.)
kirundi.how_would_you_design_a_class_where_ai_: Wateganya ute ishure aho AI yemewe ariko kwiga kudahagarara?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_ai_effort_novel: Nshobora gusigura impamvu iyi vanga ya AI/imbaraga/ubushasha/ikiguzi itanga iyi miterere.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Igikoresho c’iperereza — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gisubizo gitangwa. «Inyungu yo kwiga» ni igereranyo; gupima nyakuri bisaba isuzuma mbere/nyuma, imirimo yo kwimura n’ibizamini vyo kubika. Ingaruka z’inkunga ya AI zitandukana bitewe n’urwego (guhanga vs ikoranabuhanga vs kwiyumvira).
kirundi.pick_what_fits_today_you_can_change_th: Toranya ibikwiye uyu munsi. Ushobora guhindura ibi mu rugendo urwo ari rwo rwose. Ubukana bwinshi = impano nini y’intango.
kirundi.no_presets_yet_build_a_loadout_you_lik: Nta teguro rirahari. Ubaka ibikoresho ukunda, hanyuma ufyonde «Bika iyi ubu» kugira ubibike ubutaha.
kirundi.static_questions_never_run_out_gemini_: Ibibazo bihamye ntibishira na rimwe — Gemini ikora bishasha ako kanya.
kirundi.ai_generated_questions_can_be_wrong_ev: ⚠️ Ibibazo AI yakoze bishobora kuba bitari vyo (ndetse n’igisubizo canditsweho) — nimba hari ikigaragara nabi bwira mwigisha wawe.
kirundi.research_specific_goals_improve_perfor: Ubushakashatsi: intego zihariye zizamura imikorere + kwibanda. Toranya iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.rewards_strategy_healing_choices: Iha igihembo ingamba + amahitamwo yo gukira
kirundi.crit_during_the_winding_phase: Kora iby’ingenzi mu gihe co kwitegura
kirundi.land_a_critical_cast_correct_under_6_s: Gera ku irozi ry’ingenzi (vyo + munsi y’amasegonda 6) kugira uhagarike unagabanye ukwangirika.
kirundi.calibrated_you_said_you_knew_it_and_yo: 🎯 Vyahujwe: wavuze ko ubizi — kandi wari ubizi.
kirundi.overconfident_felt_sure_but_missed_wor: ⚠ Kwiyizera birenze: wumvise ushize amakenga ariko wabuze. Bikwiye kurabwa ubwa kabiri mu Cumba co Kwiga.
kirundi.lucky_guess_but_maybe_you_knew_more_th: 🎁 Ukwibwira kw’amahirwe — ariko wenda wari uzi vyinshi kurusha uko watekereje!
kirundi.self_aware_you_flagged_the_doubt_and_t: 🎯 Kwimenya: waranze ugushidikanya, kandi ugushidikanya kwari ukuri. Ongera ku isubiramwo.
kirundi.ai_generated_question_the_marked_answe: Ikibazo AI yakoze — igisubizo canditsweho gishobora kuba kitari co. Nimba kigaragara nabi bwira mwigisha.
kirundi.re_study_what_you_got_wrong_mark_got_i: Ongera wige ivyo wibesheho. Iyo uvyumvise shiraho «Navyumvise ubu».
kirundi.what_is_one_thing_you_learned_or_notic: Ni ikihe kintu kimwe wize canke wabonye muri iri siganwa? (Kwandika bibandanya kwibuka kurusha kwiyumvira.)
kirundi.e_g_the_bee_flower_question_keeps_trip: urugero, «Ikibazo c’uruyuki/indabo kibandanya kunyobera — ubufatanye = bombi barungukira»
kirundi.spend_essence_to_deepen_the_runes_of_e: Koresha intango kugira wimbike ibimenyetso vya buri rozi. Urwego ruhanitse = ukwangirika kw’ibanze kwinshi + ibitero binini vy’ingenzi.
kirundi.no_spells_to_upgrade_yet_unlock_spells: Nta marozi yo kuvugurura arahari. Ugurura amarozi ukina ibindi bikoresho vya STEM Lab.
kirundi.untimed_practice_no_hp_no_damage_just_: Imyitozo itagira igihe. Nta HP. Nta kwangirika. Kwibuka + ibisobanuro gusa. Ibibazo wibesheho bigaruka vuba.
kirundi.no_spells_unlocked_yet_play_other_stem: Nta rozi irafungurwa. Kina ibindi bikoresho vya STEM Lab kugira wugurure amarozi, hanyuma ugaruke hano kwimenyereza.
kirundi.no_questions_in_the_review_queue_eithe: Nta bibazo mu murongo w’isubiramwo. Canke ntabwo wakinnye bihagije canke uri gukora neza cane. Gerageza Icumba co Kwiga kwimenyereza gufite ingaruka nkeya canke utangure urugendo.
kirundi.cast_each_spell_at_least_3_times_to_se: Tangaza buri rozi nibura inshuro 3 kugira urabe imbaraga zawe nziza.
kirundi.no_weak_spots_flagged_yet_keep_casting: Nta hantu hadakomeye haramenyekana. Bandanya gutangaza!
kirundi.when_you_say_you_know_it_and_you_do_th: Iyo uvuze «ndabizi» kandi koko ubizi — ico ni ukuguza. Kudahuza (kwiyizera birenze/bike) ni ikiguzi gihishwe co kwiga.
kirundi.no_reflections_saved_yet_after_each_ex: Nta kwiyumvira kurabikwa. Nyuma ya buri rugendo andika ikintu kimwe wabonye canke wize. Wowe w’ejo hazaza uzagushimira wowe w’ubu.
